scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const pkg = await import('./dist/package.json', { with: { type: 'json' } }); if (pkg.default.type !== 'module' || pkg.default.main !== 'index.js') throw new Error('mealPhotoAnalysis dist package metadata is invalid'); const mod = await import('./dist/index.js'); if (typeof mod.main !== 'function' || typeof mod.default !== 'function') throw new Error('mealPhotoAnalysis dist entrypoint is invalid');"
